description: MANDATE-15 'busy but not broken' case: generate real, legitimate elevated traffic with the team's own locustfile.py (no flagd fault flag involved at all) and confirm the detector does NOT false-alarm on ordinary high load. Set LOCUST_HOST to the live frontend URL before running (defaults to http://localhost:8080 for docker-compose). Mirrors the load-test methodology already used in report/flagd1/postmortem-INC-01.md's KB3 section (Locust rolling-restart verification: 175 requests, 0 connection errors on the main purchase flow).
